seo.title: CAFE TOKYO | Cozy Waterfront Café · Noosaville
seo.description: Australian breakfast favourites and Japanese-inspired lunch by the water — Gympie Terrace & The Cockleshell, Noosaville.

hero.title: CAFE
descriptionLines: A relaxed Noosaville spot where Aussie brunch
meets Japanese-inspired bowls and curry by the river.

features.title: Waterfront
features.desc: Sit by the Noosa River at Gympie Terrace & The Cockleshell — easy going meals with a view.

features.title: Breakfast & brunch
features.desc: Big brekky plates, eggs benedict-style dishes, toasted bruschetta, and lighter bowl options for the morning.

features.title: Japanese-inspired lunch
features.desc: Think katsu curry, poke-style bowls, and kimchi pork bowl — fresh, colourful plates for the afternoon.

images.alt: Acai bowl — fruit, granola & seasonal toppings

menu.footerNote: Items & prices change — see the live menu on cafe-tokyo.goto-where.com.

items.name: Big Brekky
items.desc: Classic Australian breakfast plate — eggs, bacon, sausage, mushrooms, tomato & toast

items.name: Eggs Benedict (style)
items.desc: Poached eggs, hollandaise & your choice of ham, salmon or greens on muffins

items.name: Acai / breakfast bowl
items.desc: Fruit, granola & seasonal toppings — lighter start to the day

items.name: Tuna poke bowl
items.desc: Seasoned rice, fresh tuna & crunch — fresh lunchtime pick

items.name: Kimchi pork bowl
items.desc: Bold flavours, rice & greens — hearty lunchtime bowl

items.name: Fresh juice / smoothie
items.desc: Seasonal fruits — ask what’s on today

hours.label: Hours
lines: Hours can change — check the official site before you visit

reservation.title: Bookings & updates
reservation.subtitle: Menus, hours and contact details are maintained on the venue’s official page.
